```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .gauge-principle-text {
  font-size: 0.82em;
}

.uniform-field-jump {
  position: relative;
  width: min(100%, 720px);
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.uniform-field-jump canvas {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  background: #000;
}

.uniform-field-jump-formulas {
  position: absolute;
  top: 18px;
  left: 28px;
  color: rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.88);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.18;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.uniform-field-jump-formulas p {
  margin: 0.1em 0;
}
</style>

<div class="uniform-field-jump" role="img" aria-label="Field lines of an electron that was initially at rest and then starts moving uniformly; the old rest field and the new uniform-motion field are connected across a light front.">
  <canvas class="uniform-field-jump-canvas" width="760" height="500"></canvas>
  <div class="uniform-field-jump-formulas">
    <p>\(X=x-x_q(t)\)</p>
    <p>\(E_x=\dfrac{(1-\beta^2)X}{\left[X^2+(1-\beta^2)y^2\right]^{3/2}}\)</p>
    <p>\(E_y=\dfrac{(1-\beta^2)y}{\left[X^2+(1-\beta^2)y^2\right]^{3/2}}\)</p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const canvases = document.querySelectorAll(".uniform-field-jump-canvas");

  canvases.forEach((canvas) => {
    if (canvas.dataset.initialized === "true") return;
    canvas.dataset.initialized = "true";

    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const width = canvas.width;
    const height = canvas.height;

    const beta = 0.35;
    const shellWidth = 0.13;
    const seedRadius = 0.075;
    const step = 0.024;
    const maxSteps = 360;
    const xmin = -2.7;
    const xmax = 3.6;
    const ymin = -2.05;
    const ymax = 2.05;

    const seeds = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 24; i += 1) {
      const angle = (2 * Math.PI * i) / 24;
      seeds.push(angle);
    }

    function sx(x) {
      return ((x - xmin) / (xmax - xmin)) * width;
    }

    function sy(y) {
      return height - ((y - ymin) / (ymax - ymin)) * height;
    }

    function fieldUniform(x, y, xq, fieldBeta) {
      const X = x - xq;
      const oneMinusBeta2 = 1 - fieldBeta * fieldBeta;
      const denom = Math.pow(X * X + oneMinusBeta2 * y * y + 0.0009, 1.5);
      return {
        x: oneMinusBeta2 * X / denom,
        y: oneMinusBeta2 * y / denom,
      };
    }

    function smoothstep(a, b, x) {
      const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (x - a) / (b - a)));
      return t * t * (3 - 2 * t);
    }

    function solutionAt(x, y, t) {
      const xOld = 0;
      const xNew = beta * t;
      const r = Math.hypot(x, y);
      const oldField = fieldUniform(x, y, xOld, 0);
      const newField = fieldUniform(x, y, xNew, beta);
      const inner = t - shellWidth;
      const outer = t + shellWidth;
      const mix = 1 - smoothstep(inner, outer, r);

      return {
        x: oldField.x * (1 - mix) + newField.x * mix,
        y: oldField.y * (1 - mix) + newField.y * mix,
        region: r < inner ? "new" : r > outer ? "old" : "shell",
      };
    }

    function integrateLine(angle, t) {
      const xNew = beta * t;
      let x = xNew + seedRadius * Math.cos(angle);
      let y = seedRadius * Math.sin(angle);
      const points = [];

      for (let i = 0; i < maxSteps; i += 1) {
        if (x < xmin || x > xmax || y < ymin || y > ymax) break;
        const f = solutionAt(x, y, t);
        const norm = Math.hypot(f.x, f.y);
        if (norm < 1e-8) break;
        points.push({ x, y, region: f.region });
        x += step * f.x / norm;
        y += step * f.y / norm;
      }

      return points;
    }

    function drawSegment(a, b, region) {
      if (region === "new") {
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#7fc0ff";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.1;
      } else if (region === "shell") {
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ffd166";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
      } else {
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(245,245,245,0.58)";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.8;
      }

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(sx(a.x), sy(a.y));
      ctx.lineTo(sx(b.x), sy(b.y));
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawArrow(points, index) {
      if (index < 2 || index >= points.length - 2) return;
      const a = points[index - 1];
      const b = points[index + 1];
      const px = sx(points[index].x);
      const py = sy(points[index].y);
      const theta = Math.atan2(sy(a.y) - sy(b.y), sx(a.x) - sx(b.x));
      const size = 6;

      ctx.fillStyle = points[index].region === "shell" ? "#ffd166" : "rgba(245,245,245,0.86)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(px + size * Math.cos(theta), py + size * Math.sin(theta));
      ctx.lineTo(px + size * Math.cos(theta + 2.55), py + size * Math.sin(theta + 2.55));
      ctx.lineTo(px + size * Math.cos(theta - 2.55), py + size * Math.sin(theta - 2.55));
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fill();
    }

    function drawText(text, x, y, size = 17, color = "rgba(245,245,245,0.88)", align = "left") {
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.font = `${size}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif`;
      ctx.textAlign = align;
      ctx.textBaseline = "alphabetic";
      ctx.fillText(text, x, y);
    }

    function drawFrame(t) {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#000";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const xOld = 0;
      const xNew = beta * t;

      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(245,245,245,0.42)";
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(sx(xmin + 0.15), sy(0));
      ctx.lineTo(sx(xmax - 0.15), sy(0));
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.setLineDash([5, 6]);
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(245,245,245,0.35)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(sx(0), sy(ymin + 0.18));
      ctx.lineTo(sx(0), sy(ymax - 0.18));
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);

      seeds.forEach((angle) => {
        const points = integrateLine(angle, t);
        for (let i = 0; i < points.length - 1; i += 1) {
          drawSegment(points[i], points[i + 1], points[i].region);
        }
        drawArrow(points, Math.floor(points.length * 0.58));
      });

      ctx.strokeStyle = "#ffd166";
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx(0), sy(0), Math.abs(sx(t) - sx(0)), 0, 2 * Math.PI);
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(245,245,245,0.50)";
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.4;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx(xOld), sy(0), 6, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.fillStyle = "#f5f5f5";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx(xNew), sy(0), 7.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.strokeStyle = "#ffd166";
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.stroke();

      drawText("uniform motion", sx(xNew + 0.16), sy(0.34), 15, "#7fc0ff");
      drawText("front r = ct", sx(0.45), sy(t - 0.2), 15, "#ffd166");
      drawText("e", sx(xNew + 0.1), sy(-0.15), 16, "rgba(245,245,245,0.86)");
      drawText("rest field", sx(xOld - 0.22), sy(-0.17), 14, "rgba(245,245,245,0.50)");

      drawText(`β = ${beta.toFixed(2)},  c = 1,  t = ${t.toFixed(2)}`, width - 28, height - 24, 15, "rgba(245,245,245,0.62)", "right");
    }

    function animate(now) {
      const period = 7200;
      const phase = (now % period) / period;
      const t = 0.8 + 1.65 * phase;
      drawFrame(t);
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  });
})();
</script>
```
